name: UwsIncomeSubjAreaBalSumLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_balance AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD,SUBJ_AREA_NM,BAL_DT,CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD,ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BAL_DT ASC) AS row_num,COUNT(*) OVER () AS row_count FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM T WHERE T.TRGT_SYS_CD='@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND T.SUBJ_AREA_NM='@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}'), cte_recursive AS (SELECT row_num,row_count,TRGT_SYS_CD,SUBJ_AREA_NM,BAL_DT,CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD,ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD,0 AS svPrevCount,1 AS svCurrCount,'' AS svTempTlrncCd,'' AS svTempRslvIn,'' AS svTempRslvIncd FROM cte_balance WHERE row_num=1 UNION ALL SELECT c2.row_num,c2.row_count,c2.TRGT_SYS_CD,c2.SUBJ_AREA_NM,c2.BAL_DT,c2.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD,c2.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD,r.svCurrCount AS svPrevCount,r.svCurrCount+1 AS svCurrCount,CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),c2.BAL_DT,120),1,10)<>'@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' WHEN (c2.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''NA'')) AND (c2.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''NA'')) AND r.svTempTlrncCd NOT IN(''OUT'',''IN'') THEN 'BAL' WHEN ((c2.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''IN'')) OR (c2.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''IN''))) AND r.svTempTlrncCd<>'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END AS svTempTlrncCd,CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),c2.BAL_DT,120),1,10)='@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN r.svTempRslvIn WHEN ((c2.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''IN'')) OR (c2.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''IN''))) AND r.svTempRslvIncd<>'OUT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS svTempRslvIn,CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),c2.BAL_DT,120),1,10)='@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' WHEN (c2.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''NA'')) AND (c2.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''NA'')) AND r.svTempRslvIncd NOT IN(''OUT'',''IN'') THEN 'BAL' WHEN ((c2.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''IN'')) OR (c2.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN(''BAL'',''IN''))) AND r.svTempRslvIncd<>'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END AS svTempRslvIncd FROM cte_balance c2 JOIN cte_recursive r ON c2.row_num=r.row_num+1) SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AS TRGT_SYS_CD,'@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AS SUBJ_AREA_NM,CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_BAL_DT,r.svTempTlrncCd AS TLRNC_CD,r.svTempRslvIn AS PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN,@{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AS TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO,CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS CRT_DTM,CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DTM,'@{pipeline().parameters.UWSAcct}' AS USER_ID FROM cte_recursive r WHERE r.row_num=r.row_count

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY:   IdsIncomeBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job loads the SUBJECT_AREA_BAL_SUM table after the balancing control job is done for a given Subject Area

Annotations:
Job Name: UwsIncomeSubjAreaBalSumLoad
Extraction From Table Balance Summary table for a given subject area and target system and loading into the Subject Area Balance Summary table
Read all the Data from UWS TBL_BAL_SUM TBL_BAL_SUM Table; Pull records based on SOURCE AND  SUBJECT
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Left Join to pull the MemberCounts 
Join Keys:
SOURCE AND SUBJECT
Defaults and Null Handling
Update then Insert the SUBJ_AREA_BAL_SUM Data.
